patch.value: Three predicates in src/cli/extension-command-help.ts decide whether an extension flag consumes a value, and they disagree: extensionFlagTakesValueForInvocation (~L131) returns required OR value_name OR value_type!=boolean; formatDynamicExtensionParseOptionFlags (~L550) requires value_type!=boolean AND (value_name OR value_type OR required); buildDynamicExtensionHelpOptionSummary (~L650) sets takes_value/value_required from value_name alone, ignoring value_type. A flag declared with value_type=string but no value_name is a value flag to parse/recovery yet renders takes_value:false in help summaries; a required boolean diverges between the first two. Same drift family as CLOSED pm-9qcr (ext-contract boolean arity) and the pm-ulqu render-from-declared-domain class - fix by unifying on one contract-derived predicate, never per-surface patches.
Extension flag value-arity decided by three divergent predicates in cli/extension-command-help.ts - help, parse, and summary surfaces can disagree

One shared value-arity predicate derived from the declared flag contract (long/short/value_name/value_type/type/required/list) exported from extension-command-help.ts; extensionFlagTakesValueForInvocation, formatDynamicExtensionParseOptionFlags, and buildDynamicExtensionHelpOptionSummary all consume it (summary currently ignores value_type entirely - takes_value is value_name-only); Parity spec asserts boolean, value-name-only, value-type-only, and required flags render and parse identically across help block, commander option registration, help-option summaries, and recovery hints

author: codex-tracker-governance

patch.value: Unify extension-flag value-arity derivation across parsing, help, summaries, and recovery so one declared contract produces identical behavior on every surface.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Implementation evidence: one resolveExtensionFlagArity contract now drives invocation recovery, Commander registration, help rendering, and structured summaries. Explicit booleans never consume the next argv token; type/value-name/required/list metadata consistently imply a value. Focused extension help and CLI error suites passed.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Verification evidence (2026-07-23): full instrumented repository suite passed 347 files / 6,146 tests with exact 100% statements (41,920/41,920), branches (29,630/29,630), functions (8,532/8,532), and lines (40,744/40,744). pnpm lint passed ESLint, zero jscpd clones, 100% source/export/member docstrings, package-boundary audit, and token-budget gate. pnpm security:scan found no credential-like tracked content; pnpm audit --prod found no known vulnerabilities. Packed artifact proof passed scripts/smoke-npx-from-pack.mjs (version 2026.7.23, 15 packages). A separate fresh /tmp consumer installed the npm tarball, initialized an isolated tracker, generated schema and renderer scaffolds, accepted repeated identical --capability values, rejected conflicting values, installed the scoped renderer, and returned extension doctor ok=true without a global renderer warning.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Consolidated release-gate evidence: all owned local gates passed, including exact coverage, version policy/sync, secret scan, packed npx smoke, and 88-command package-first dogfood. The aggregate command stopped only at greptile-review because this branch is intentionally not committed yet (reported: no committed code changes to review against main); review convergence will run after push and is not being misclassified as a code/test failure.

patch.value: Unified extension flag value arity across recovery, Commander registration, structured help, and summaries through one exported resolver with regression coverage.
